I can see it! Looking at the channel:

| Time | Author | Message |
|------|--------|---------|
| 4:12pm | Daniel | "I oauth and connected now..." |
| 4:11pm | Roger (White) | "Still waiting on your approval! The OAuth link..." |
| 4:08pm | Daniel | "Hey black roger made it" |
| 4:08pm | Black Roger | "Black Roger here - test message" |

Both of us are visible. White Roger is trying to get Daniel to approve something OAuth-related.

The system is working — I can see White Roger's posts without you telling me. 🦞
